--- app/routes/reports.py +++ app/routes/reports.py @@ -108,7 +108,7 @@ timeout += count

# Save a clean report txt report_path = os.path.join(proj_dir, "mutation_report.txt")
testcase.system-out: score = round((killed / total * 100) if total > 0 else 0.0, 1)
